About Kromax South Asia

Over two decades of engineering expertise, delivered across Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Taiwan.

Who We Are

Regional Expertise.
Global Standards.

Kromax South Asia is a Singapore-headquartered distributor of high-performance engineering and healthcare solutions, serving enterprises across South and Southeast Asia for over 20 years.

We represent best-in-class technology across three distinct verticals — industrial, medical, and personal health — with the deep domain knowledge each sector demands.

🇸🇬 Singapore HQ🇲🇾 Malaysia🇮🇩 Indonesia🇹🇼 Taiwan
20+
Years of regional engineering expertise
3
Business verticals across industries
4
Markets served across SEA
100%
Enterprise and institutional focus
Our Approach

What Sets Us Apart

🎯

Curated Principals

We represent only best-in-class technology partners — selected for performance, reliability and fit for our regional markets.

🤝

Deep Domain Knowledge

Sector-specific expertise, not just product knowledge — we understand the operational context of every solution.

🌏

Regional Reach

Singapore-based with established presence in Malaysia, Indonesia and Taiwan — navigating regulatory and commercial nuances of each market.

Let's Work Together

Whether you're looking for a solution or a strategic partner, we'd like to hear from you.

Personal Health Solutions

Quantum frequency technologies for clinical practitioners, corporate wellness programmes and personal well-being.

Programme Areas

Clinical Integrative Medicine
Corporate Wellness
Personal Home Care
Pain Management Protocols
Practitioner Education
01 · CLINICAL SYSTEMS

TimeWaver Pro & Frequency

Professional bioresonance and frequency therapy systems for integrative medicine practitioners and wellness clinics.

Request details →
02 · CORPORATE WELLNESS

TimeWaver Biz & Coach

Business analytics and personal coaching platforms using frequency-based insights for corporate well-being programmes.

Request details →
03 · SPECIALISED PROTOCOLS

TimeWaver Frequency McMakin

Frequency-specific microcurrent (FSM) protocols developed by Carolyn McMakin for clinical pain management.

Request details →
04 · HOME CARE

TimeWaver Home

Personal wellness device for home users — guided frequency sessions for stress, sleep and general well-being.

Request details →
05 · EDUCATION

Coaching & Educational Materials

Practitioner training programmes, certification courses and educational resources for TimeWaver technology users.

Request details →

Transform Wellness Outcomes

Whether you're a clinician, corporate wellness lead or individual — we have a programme for you.

News & Events

Stay up to date with the latest from Kromax South Asia — announcements, exhibitions, partnerships and more.

Exhibition · 14 May 2025

Kromax South Asia Showcases AI-Driven Energy Optimisation at Semicon SEA 2025

Our team presented the industry's first retrofit-ready AI chiller optimisation solution to over 8,000 semiconductor and electronics professionals across three days at Marina Bay Sands, Singapore.

Read full story →
Partnership · 3 Apr 2025

Strategic Partnership Signed with Leading European MedTech Manufacturer

Kromax South Asia formalises exclusive distribution rights across South and Southeast Asia for next-generation surgical navigation systems.

Read more →
Award · 18 Feb 2025

EcoChamp 2025 Award for Outstanding Energy Innovation in Semiconductor Manufacturing

Our Intelligent Solar & Sustainability platform receives top recognition from Singapore's EDB-backed Energy Efficiency Fund programme.

Read more →
Product Launch · 5 Jan 2025

New NeuroPath Spinal Cord Stimulator Range Now Available Across South Asia

Kromax Medical division expands its neuromodulation portfolio with MRI-conditional SCS devices approved for distribution in Singapore, Malaysia and India.

Read more →
Upcoming · 22 Aug 2025

Kromax at Healthcare Asia Summit 2025 — Booth G14

Meet our medical team at the region's premier healthcare conference. Live demonstrations of our minimally invasive surgical navigation systems.

Register to attend →
ESG · 10 Nov 2024

Kromax Publishes Inaugural Sustainability Report — 34% Carbon Reduction in Client Facilities

Aggregated data across 18 client installations demonstrates significant scope-2 emission reductions driven by our AI energy optimisation deployments.

Download report →
Company · 2 Oct 2024

Kromax South Asia Opens New Regional Office in Kuala Lumpur

Expanding our footprint in Malaysia with a dedicated engineering and sales team to serve clients across the Klang Valley semiconductor corridor.

Read more →

Resources

Technical papers, product brochures, and webinars to help you evaluate and specify Kromax solutions.

Technical Paper · 2025

AI-Driven Chiller Optimisation: ROI Analysis Across 12 Semiconductor Fabs

Field data from 12 installations demonstrates average energy savings of 28% with payback periods under 18 months.

Technical Paper · 2024

Predictive Maintenance in Cleanroom Environments: A Clinical Study

IoT-based condition monitoring reduces unplanned downtime by 71% in ISO Class 5–7 semiconductor cleanrooms.

Brochure · 2025

Kromax Semiconductor & Industrial Solutions — Full Portfolio Brochure

Complete overview of our energy, monitoring, gas safety and sustainability solutions for semiconductor and industrial clients.

Brochure · 2025

Product guide covering our full range of interventional cardiology, surgical navigation and spinal cord stimulation systems.

Webinar · Mar 2025 · 52 min

Achieving ISO 50001 Compliance Without Capital Expenditure

Energy & Monitoring

KroMax SmartMeter Pro

3-phase energy monitoring module with IoT gateway, real-time dashboard and 12-month data history. Installs in 2 hours.

SGD 1,480 per unit
Safety & Monitoring

GasSafe Detector Module

4-gas detection unit (NH3, HF, H2, N2O) with alarm relay, MODBUS output and 2-year sensor warranty. IECEx certified.

SGD 860 per unit
Medical Consumables

Interventional Catheter Kit

Single-use interventional catheter set — 6F, hydrophilic coated, ISO 13485 certified. Box of 5 units. Requires institutional procurement approval.

SGD 320 box of 5
Surgical Supplies

Sterile Surgical Drape Set

Universal surgical drape set compatible with all major imaging and navigation systems. Gamma-sterilised, CE marked. Box of 10.

SGD 180 box of 10
Personal Wellness

KroMax Quantum Wellness Band

Bioresonance-based wellness wearable. Monitors HRV, sleep quality and stress indices. App-connected. 30-day return guarantee.

SGD 398 per unit

Solar Analytics Gateway

Cloud-connected gateway for existing solar PV systems. Provides generation analytics, export monitoring and ESG reporting exports.
